title: nasturtium capitatum
intro: Nasturtium capitatum, also known as Indian cress, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The plant has been used to treat ailments such as colds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Nasturtium capitatum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin to harness its medicinal benefits.
